untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection requires trend line identification and price interaction analysis (touching lower trend line, partial rise stopping before upper trend line, return to lower trend line). These geometric/structural pattern conditions cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators (moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, volume, price position). Trend lines require dynamic calculation based on swing points and slope analysis, which is not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: This ascending broadening wedge pattern is a visual/structural pattern that requires identifying: (1) two diverging trend lines, (2) price touching the lower line, (3) a partial rise that stops before the upper line, (4) return to lower line. These conditions depend on real-time trend line calculation and geometric relationships between price and those lines. The provided entry_short and exit_short use a simplified moving average crossover as a placeholder, but this does NOT capture the true pattern logic. A proper implementation would require a custom pattern recognition indicator or trend line detection engine.
